name: Reeses Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and peanut butter together.
2. Add the crushed crackers and powdered sugar to the melted mixture.
3. Press the mixture into a 9x13 pan.
4. Melt 1 cup of chocolate chips with 2/3 cup of peanut butter.
5. Spread the melted chocolate and peanut butter over the top of the pressed mixture.
6. Allow the bars to cool completely before serving.
